title: Odd Jobs & Classifieds
description: The small, strange, and occasionally suspicious jobs that ordinary people post to community boards, message apps, and word-of-mouth networks — work that doesn't require credentials, just willingness.

entries.result: Need someone to drive a car across three states. I won't be in it. Delivery address provided on day of pickup. Cash on arrival, no questions.
Looking for a person to sit in my house for the weekend. Just be present. Lights on, a car in the driveway, answer the door if anyone knocks. Don't open it.
I need someone to return a library book for me. The library is in another city. The book is overdue by eleven years. Bring cash for the fine.
Hiring someone to attend a family dinner in my place. You'll need to know my name, my job, and a few facts about my life. I'll brief you. Payment up front.
I need a person to follow me home from work for the next three nights. Walk behind me, look like you're going the same direction. Tell me if anything else follows me.
Looking for someone to photograph a specific street corner every hour for forty-eight hours straight. No explanation necessary. Good hourly rate.
I need help reading my late grandmother's letters. They're in a language I don't speak. You don't need to translate them — just tell me if any of them are addressed to me.
Hiring someone to move furniture in a house I don't own yet. The closing is next week. The current owner said it was fine. I need it done before then.
I need someone to pick up a dog from a kennel using my name. The kennel thinks I'm picking up a different dog than I'm picking up. Bring a leash.
Looking for someone to spend the night in my apartment while I'm not there. Nothing will happen. I just need to know it didn't.
Need a person to deliver a sealed envelope to an address. Do not put it in the mailbox. Hand it to whoever answers the door. Leave immediately.
I need someone to witness a conversation I'm about to have with my business partner and write down everything that's said. You won't be introduced. Sit at the next table.
Looking for someone to pick up a package from a storage unit and hold it for me for a week. Don't open it. I'll contact you when I'm ready.
Need a ride to an address I'll provide day-of. One way. Might be a long wait on your end. Extra pay for waiting. No radio please.
I need someone to call a number and ask for a person named Gerald. Say you're an old friend and you're in town. If Gerald is there, say you'll call back and hang up. Report whether Gerald was there.
Hiring someone to bid on an item at auction on my behalf. I'll tell you the maximum bid the morning of. Don't go over it. I need this item. Do not let anyone know who you're bidding for.
Looking for someone to be present at a specific park bench every day at 3:15 p.m. for one week. You don't have to do anything. Just be there.
Need a person to physically go to an old address and confirm a building is still there. Take a photo of the front door. Note the name on any mailboxes.
I'm selling a lot of books and need help sorting them. Some of them you should put aside and not include in the sale. I'll describe them when you arrive.
Hiring someone to keep a list of every person who enters or exits a specific building between 8 a.m. and 6 p.m. on Saturday. Descriptions only, no photos.
Need someone to meet a man named Terrence at a bus station and give him an envelope. Don't open the envelope. Don't answer questions about who sent you.
I need a person to wear a specific jacket and walk through a neighborhood I'll describe. Note if anyone reacts to the jacket. Bring the jacket back.
Looking for someone to accompany my elderly father to a doctor's appointment. He'll tell you it isn't a doctor's appointment. He's wrong. Don't let him leave.
Hiring a person to clean out an old apartment before the end of the lease. Keep nothing. Leave nothing. Bring trash bags.
I need someone to attend a meeting on my behalf. It's a neighborhood association. Vote no on every motion. I'll explain later.
Need a ride for three people and a medium-sized crate to an address in the countryside. The people are quiet. The crate is light.
Looking for someone to stand outside a specific restaurant from 7–9 p.m. on Friday and take a photo of the street every fifteen minutes. I'll explain the next day.
I need someone to return a borrowed item to its owner. The owner doesn't know I have it. Don't tell them who returned it. Don't leave a note.
Hiring a person to pick up my prescription under my name. I'll give you my ID and insurance card. Return them and the medication when done.
Need someone to go to a specific bar and play the jukebox. Play the third song on the list, three times in a row. Then leave. Don't talk to anyone.
Looking for help removing and disposing of everything from a specific storage unit. None of it can go to a charity or secondhand shop. All of it must be destroyed.
I need someone to mail a package from a post office in a different city than where I live. I'll have it shipped to you. Mail it from wherever you are.
Hiring someone to accompany me to a meeting and leave with me if I give a specific signal. No reason given. Payment good.
Need a person to knock on a specific door and ask the occupant if they still have my grandmother's rocking chair. Note their reaction. Come back and tell me.
Looking for someone to be my guest at a company function. You'll need to know my name and department. Don't volunteer extra information. Smile and eat the food.
I need help packing a house. One room is off-limits and I'll handle it myself. Everything else goes in boxes. The boxes will be picked up. You don't need to know by who.
Need someone to do a reading of a will at a family gathering. You're not a lawyer but you have to read it like one. I'll provide the document. There will be conflict.
Hiring a person to check on my car every six hours for the next three days. Park it in a visible spot, make sure it hasn't been touched. Report in at each check.
I need someone to buy a specific book from a specific used bookstore. Ask for it by name. Note the reaction of the person behind the counter.
Looking for someone to show up to a job interview on my behalf and see what the job actually involves. Tell them you'll need to think about it. Come back and tell me what you learned.
Need a person to watch my apartment building's entrance from across the street between midnight and 4 a.m. tonight. Note any cars that park and don't leave.
I need help convincing my neighbor that the tree on the property line is mine. Bring a measuring tape and look official.
Hiring someone to pick up a suitcase from a locker at a train station. The code is 7744. Bring the suitcase to a coffee shop I'll name and leave it with the bartender.
Looking for a person to go to a city council meeting and ask a specific question during the public comment period. I'll write the question. You just read it.
Need someone to interview for a position at a company I'm investigating. You won't take the job. I just need someone who can get inside and see the offices.
I need help talking my brother out of a very bad financial decision. I can't be the one to do it. You don't need to know the details — just be convincingly skeptical.
Hiring a person to bring flowers to a gravesite on behalf of someone who can't travel. I'll provide the name and address. There's a letter to leave as well. Don't read it.
Need a ride from a specific location at 2 a.m. No details about why. Guarantee you won't ask questions. Payment is triple the normal rate.
Looking for someone to act as a landlord for a prospective tenant viewing. Show them the apartment, answer questions generally, say you'll be in touch. Report what they asked about.
I need a person to go to a specific address and retrieve a key from under the doormat. Bring the key to me. Don't enter the building.
Hiring someone to sit on a park bench every morning this week from 7–8 a.m. and write down who talks to whom. No photos. Descriptions only.
Need a person to attend a church service and sit in the third row from the front on the right side. Nothing else required. Payment on return.
Looking for someone to hold a piece of luggage at a specific location for two hours. Don't open it. Don't leave the location. Hand it to whoever asks for it.
I need help with a conversation I need to have with a difficult person. You won't do the talking — you'll be there so that I have a witness. Payment regardless of outcome.
Hiring a driver who can be available on call for the next seventy-two hours. Short trips, no advance notice, no questions.
Need someone to verify that a specific item is still in a specific pawn shop. Don't buy it. Don't ask about it. Just look at the shelves and confirm it's there.
Looking for a person to clean out a motel room before checkout. Remove all personal effects. Nothing goes to lost and found. Bring a bag.
I need a favor that I'll explain in person. Meet me at an address I'll text you an hour before. If I'm not there in fifteen minutes, leave.
Hiring someone to retrieve a voicemail from an answering machine at a specific number. Call the number, listen to the messages, transcribe them, report back.
Need a person to accompany an elderly woman to the airport and see her through security. She won't want help. Help her anyway. She's my aunt and she gets confused.
Looking for someone who can read a contract and tell me in plain language what it means. Not legal advice. Just read it and summarize. Payment for your time.
I need a person to stand at a specific street corner and hand an envelope to a man who will approach and say 'is this the line for the bus.' Say yes and give him the envelope.
Hiring someone to drive me to an appointment I don't want to go to. If I try to turn back, tell me to keep going. Firm but kind.
Need a person to spend the morning in a waiting room at a government office and tell me what number they get to by 11 a.m. I'm planning ahead.
Looking for help loading a truck. I'll explain what we're moving when you get there. It's legal. It's heavy. Bring gloves.
I need someone to attend an auction and signal me — by texting a number I'll give you — the moment a specific lot number comes up.
Hiring a person to research a specific name in public records and report back what they find. Legal name, addresses over time, any public filings.
Need someone to sit next to a specific person on a train and record the conversation they have on their phone without participating in it.
Looking for help finishing a mural that my father started before he died. You don't have to be a painter. You just have to follow the sketch he left.
I need a favor I can't explain in writing. Call the number. We'll talk. If it sounds wrong, hang up and I won't hold it against you.
Hiring someone to receive a delivery at my address when I can't be there. Sign for it. Don't open it. Text me when it arrives. Leave it by the door.
Need a person to follow my instructions at a specific location: walk in, go to the counter, order coffee, sit at the window table, drink it, leave. Note anyone who watches you.
Looking for someone to return a stolen bicycle to its owner. I found it. I know where it belongs. I'd rather not be involved. I'll give you the address.
I need help getting someone to leave a building voluntarily. No force. I just need a convincing reason given at the right moment. I'll explain the reason.
Hiring a person to be present while I have a difficult conversation with my lawyer. I need a witness. You don't need any legal knowledge. Just be there and remember what's said.
Need someone to go to a storage auction and bid on a specific unit. I can't be there. Don't pay more than the number I'll text you.
Looking for a person to help me find something I lost six years ago. I know roughly where to look. I just need someone who can go there because I can't.
I need help with something embarrassing that I can't explain here. Meet me. If you're willing after I explain, great. If not, no hard feelings and I'll pay for your time.
Hiring someone to write a letter on my behalf. I'll dictate it. You'll sign your own name. It's going to someone who won't believe it came from me.
Need a person to pick up my child from school and keep them occupied for two hours. I'll be late. I'll explain when I arrive.
Looking for someone to do a wellness check on a friend who won't answer my calls. Go to the address. Knock. Tell me what you find.
I need someone to carry a message. Not digitally. In person. From here to a person I'll describe, at an address I'll provide. No explanation necessary.
Hiring a person to pose as a potential buyer for a piece of property. Look at it carefully. Ask specific questions. Walk away without committing. Report back what you observed.
Need a driver who can navigate without using maps on their phone. Paper maps fine. No digital navigation. I'll explain why when we're moving.
Looking for someone to find a person I've lost track of. All I have is a last known address from seven years ago and a description.
I need a body double for one hour. We're similar enough in appearance. You'll walk to a specific building, enter the lobby, wait ten minutes, and leave. Don't speak to anyone.
Hiring a person to go through a box of old mail and flag anything that doesn't look like routine correspondence. Some of it may be unpleasant to read. Fair warning.
Need someone to stand outside a building and count how many different people enter between 9 a.m. and noon. Bring a clicker. No explanation.
Looking for help recovering something that's technically mine but is in someone else's hands. I'd rather not involve legal processes. I'll explain the situation.
I need a companion for a road trip I don't want to take alone. Two days, one destination, my car, expenses covered. You don't have to talk if you don't want to.
Hiring someone to attend a show at a specific venue and sit in a specific seat. Report who sits next to you. Don't talk to them.
Need a person to hold a key for me for thirty days. If I don't contact you by the end of the thirty days, use the key. I'll tell you what it opens when I give you the key.
Looking for someone with a good memory who can attend a meeting without taking notes and relay the contents afterward. No recording devices.
I need a favor involving a dog, a park, a specific bench, and a conversation I don't want to have face-to-face. I'll explain when you call.
Hiring someone to sort through a deceased relative's belongings and tell me if there's anything that doesn't belong there. I'll know it when you describe it.
Need a person to knock on my neighbor's door and tell them the noise has been noticed. Don't say by who. Don't threaten anything. Just let them know.
Looking for someone willing to make an anonymous tip to a specific organization. I'll provide the information. I can't make the call myself. Caller ID blocked, untraceable number preferred.
I need a person to be in a specific location at a specific time and simply exist — be present, be visible. It's important that someone was there. I'll explain if it becomes necessary.
Hiring someone for a job I'll only describe in person, at a location of my choosing, after you've agreed to come. The job is not illegal. The reason for the secrecy is.
Need help with something. Good pay. Simple task. One day. Can't say what it is in a posting. Trust is the price of the explanation. Call if you're willing to find out.
